case_title: ROGER WONG VS. DAVID IBARA LOPEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, DAVID IBARA
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT DAVID LOPEZ' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S DISCOVERY REQUEST; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. THE PLAINTIFF'S SERVICE ON MARCH 18, 2015 OF AN UNVERIFIED RESPONSE TO THE DOCUMENT REQUEST AFTER FILING OF THIS MOTION, COUPLED WITH NON-SERVICE OF ACTUAL DOCUMENTS, DOES NOT MEET PLAINTIFF'S STATUTORY DISCOVERY OBLIGATIONS. A VERIFIED RESPONSE TO THE DOCUMENT REQUEST WITH DOCUMENTS SHALL BE SERVED WITHIN FOURTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $580.00 ARE AWARDED AND SHALL BE PAID WITHIN FOURTEEN DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Vacated

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Off Calendar

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Set For Trial On Nov-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Request; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT DAVID LOPEZ' Motion to Compel Plaintiff's Responses to Defendant's Discovery Request; Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. The plaintiff's service on March 18, 2015 of an unverified response to the document request after filing of this motion, coupled with non-service of actual documents, does not meet plaintiff's statutory discovery obligations. A verified response to the document request with documents shall be served within fourteen days of the date of this Order. Sanctions in the sum of $580.00 are awarded and shall be paid within fourteen days of the date of this Order. Order signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
